description: This file defines a REST controller for managing supporting documents in a business loan API. It provides endpoints for uploading, listing, updating metadata, downloading, and deleting documents, with security and metadata handling integrated.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentController
classes.description: RestController class handling API endpoints for supporting document operations, including upload, list, download, delete, and metadata update.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Handles uploading of a supporting document, saves metadata, and associates it with a user and optional draft.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Retrieves list of documents belonging to the authenticated user, optionally filtered by draft ID.

methods.name: updateMetadata
methods.description: Replaces the metadata JSON associated with a specific document.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Downloads the raw bytes of a specified document if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes the specified document and its metadata if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts UUID user ID from authentication object, throws error if invalid or unauthenticated.
